4624.name: An account was successfully logged on
4624.description: Generated when a logon session is created.
4624.investigation_tips: Check for unusual hours, source IPs, logon types (Type 3=Network, Type 10=RemoteInteractive)

4625.name: An account failed to log on
4625.investigation_tips: Multiple failures = brute force (T1110). Check TargetUserName and IpAddress.

4648.name: Logon using explicit credentials
4648.investigation_tips: Common in lateral movement and pass-the-hash attacks.

4688.name: A new process has been created
4688.investigation_tips: Check NewProcessName vs ParentProcessName. Suspicious: powershell from word/excel.

4732.name: Member added to security-enabled local group
4732.investigation_tips: Adding to Administrators group = privilege escalation.

4768.name: Kerberos TGT requested
4768.investigation_tips: Watch for AS-REP roasting (no pre-auth) and golden ticket attacks.

4769.name: Kerberos service ticket requested
4769.investigation_tips: Multiple TGS requests for sensitive SPNs = Kerberoasting.

4776.name: NTLM authentication attempted
4776.investigation_tips: Unexpected NTLM from workstations = pass-the-hash potential.

7045.name: New service installed
7045.investigation_tips: Malware often installs services for persistence.

4103.name: PowerShell pipeline execution
4103.investigation_tips: Look for encoded commands, DownloadString, IEX patterns.

4104.name: PowerShell script block logging
4104.investigation_tips: Most detailed PowerShell logging. Check for obfuscation.

1.name: Process Creation
1.description: Process created with full command line.
1.investigation_tips: Includes hash, parent process, command line. Best process tracking source.

3.name: Network Connection
3.investigation_tips: Monitor unexpected outbound to rare IPs/ports. C2 detection.

8.name: CreateRemoteThread
8.description: Remote thread created in another process.

11.name: File Created
11.investigation_tips: Track malware drops, downloads to temp directories.

12.name: Registry Object Added/Deleted
12.investigation_tips: Run keys, services, COM hijacking persistence.

22.name: DNS Query
22.investigation_tips: DGA domains, DNS tunneling, C2 beaconing via DNS.

Security.description: Windows Security events — logon, account mgmt, policy changes

Sysmon.description: Sysinternals Sysmon — enhanced process, network, registry tracking

System.description: Windows System events — services, drivers, system errors

PowerShell.description: PowerShell script block and module logging

WinRM.description: Windows Remote Management — remote PowerShell sessions
